creator: me@enriquefynn.com
text:
Created attachment 236064
go-ethereum-1.10.22.patch

Upgrades go-ethereum to 1.10.22.
Notably, this update updates consensus to PoS!

Enables the Merge for the Ethereum mainnet at a Terminal Total Difficulty of 58_750_000_000_000_000_000_000.

More info: https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/releases/tag/v1.10.22
